name: io.github.iancollins27/mailsnail
description: Send USPS letters, postcards & certified mail from any agent. No signup; pay-per-piece via Stripe.

environmentVariables.name: MAIL_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Where to mail from: 'managed' (default, no signup, pay-per-piece via Stripe), 'click2mail' (BYO account), or 'lob' (BYO key).

environmentVariables.name: MAIL_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Hosted Mailsnail backend. Required when MAIL_PROVIDER=managed.

environmentVariables.name: CLICK2MAIL_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Click2Mail account username. Required when MAIL_PROVIDER=click2mail.

environmentVariables.name: CLICK2MAIL_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Click2Mail account password. Required when MAIL_PROVIDER=click2mail.

environmentVariables.name: LOB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Lob API key. Required when MAIL_PROVIDER=lob. test_* is free; live_* actually mails.

environmentVariables.name: MAIL_MCP_ALLOW_LIVE
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to actually mail in BYOK modes. Default '0' is dry-run.

environmentVariables.name: MAIL_MCP_SPEND_CAP_USD
environmentVariables.description: Per-session estimated spend cap. Server refuses sends past this.
